queries.question: Show the list of flights, their plane manufacturers, source and destination airports with their departure date and times and order the list by date and time.
queries.sql:
SELECT
Flights.flight_number,
Planes.manufacturer_name,
Source.name, 
Dest.name,
Flights.departure_date,
Flights.scheduled_departure_time
FROM Flights
JOIN Planes ON Planes.id = Flights.plane_id
JOIN Routes ON Routes.id = Flights.route_id
JOIN Airports AS Source ON Source.id = Routes.source_airport_id
JOIN Airports AS Dest ON Dest.id = Routes.destination_airport_id
ORDER BY Flights.departure_date ASC, Flights.scheduled_departure_time ASC
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?flight_number ?manufacturer_name ?name ?name2 ?departure_date ?scheduled_departure_time WHERE {
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?planes a :Planes .
  ?flights p:hasPlanes ?planes .
  ?routes a :Routes .
  ?flights p:hasRoutes ?routes .
  ?source a :Airports .
  ?routes p:hasAirports_source_airport_id ?source .
  ?dest a :Airports .
  ?routes p:hasAirports_destination_airport_id ?dest .
  ?flights p:flight_number ?flight_number .
  ?planes p:manufacturer_name ?manufacturer_name .
  ?source p:name ?name .
  ?dest p:name ?name2 .
  ?flights p:departure_date ?departure_date .
  ?flights p:scheduled_departure_time ?scheduled_departure_time .
  ?flights p:departure_date ?departure_date_o .
  ?flights p:scheduled_departure_time ?scheduled_departure_time_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?departure_date_o) ASC(?scheduled_departure_time_o)

queries.question: List the flights with the corresponding airlines, aircraft families and pilots assigned to the flights.
queries.sql:
SELECT 
Flights.flight_number,
Airlines.airline_name,
Planes.manufacturer_name,
Pilots.full_name
FROM Flights
JOIN Routes ON Routes.id = Flights.route_id
JOIN Planes ON Planes.id = Flights.plane_id
JOIN AssignsPilotToFlight APTF ON APTF.flight_id = Flights.id
JOIN Pilots ON Pilots.id = APTF.pilot_id
JOIN Airlines ON Airlines.id = Routes.airline_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?flight_number ?airline_name ?manufacturer_name ?full_name WHERE {
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?routes a :Routes .
  ?flights p:hasRoutes ?routes .
  ?planes a :Planes .
  ?flights p:hasPlanes ?planes .
  ?aptf a :AssignsPilotToFlight .
  ?aptf p:hasFlights ?flights .
  ?pilots a :Pilots .
  ?aptf p:hasPilots ?pilots .
  ?airlines a :Airlines .
  ?routes p:hasAirlines ?airlines .
  ?flights p:flight_number ?flight_number .
  ?airlines p:airline_name ?airline_name .
  ?planes p:manufacturer_name ?manufacturer_name .
  ?pilots p:name ?full_name .
}

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?flight_number ?manufacturer_name ?name ?name2 ?departure_date ?scheduled_departure_time WHERE {
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?planes a :Planes .
  ?flights p:hasPlanes ?planes .

  ?flights p:scheduled_departure_time ?scheduled_departure_time .
  ?flights p:departure_date ?departure_date_o .
  ?flights p:scheduled_departure_time ?scheduled_departure_time_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?departure_date_o) ASC(?scheduled_departure_time_o) }
  full: { SELECT ?flight_number ?manufacturer_name ?model_name ?name ?name2 ?departure_date ?scheduled_departure_time WHERE {
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?planes a :Planes .
  ?flights p:hasPlanes ?planes .

  ?flights p:departure_date ?departure_date_o .
  ?flights p:scheduled_departure_time ?scheduled_departure_time_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?departure_date_o) ASC(?scheduled_departure_time_o) }
  component_2: { SELECT ?flight_number ?model_name ?name ?name2 ?departure_date ?scheduled_departure_time WHERE {
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?planes a :Planes .
  ?flights p:hasPlanes ?planes .

  ?dest p:name ?name2 .
  ?flights p:departure_date ?departure_date .
  ?flights p:scheduled_departure_time ?scheduled_departure_time .
  ?flights p:departure_date ?departure_date_o .
  ?flights p:scheduled_departure_time ?scheduled_departure_time_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?departure_date_o) ASC(?scheduled_departure_time_o) }
}
